examples: He set down the pipkin of milk upon the dresser, and looked suspiciously at the tea-cups.
Nathaniel Pipkin had ocular demonstration of the fact that the rumours of old Lobbs treasures were NOT exaggerated.
"And then one of the guys goes, 'That there was Brooklyn country, '" Kanene Pipkin said.
Over the years, Pipkin has apparently brought in just one outside investor, Summit Partners, in 2002.
